audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 404-406 unconditionally compute `isZero = (price == 0)`, `isStale = (updatedAt < block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold)`, and `isValid = !isZero && !isStale`, which is logically equivalent to the assertion. The optional fallback path (L384-401) may update `price` and `updatedAt` before this computation, but all paths converge at L404-406, so `isValid` always reflects the final values.
